businessBackground: Organogenesis Holdings is a US-based regenerative medicine company developing, manufacturing, and commercializing advanced wound-care and surgical/sports-medicine products. Core business: **advanced wound care** for diabetic foot ulcers (DFUs) and venous leg ulcers (VLUs) delivered through physician offices, hospital outpatient, and wound care clinics. Primary competitive position is built on **PMA-approved (FDA Premarket Approval) products** — the highest regulatory classification requiring Phase 3 pivotal evidence.

rcChecklist.criterion: Latest annual filing (10-K/20-F) reviewed within 12 months
rcChecklist.evidence: filing row dated 2026-04-20 in Sources Processed

rcChecklist.criterion: ≥2 earnings transcripts reviewed (or waived if ticker has no transcripts available)

rcChecklist.evidence: fair-value / scenario PW-FV present in THESIS.md

rcChecklist.criterion: debate-session run across all 6 pressure vectors

rcChecklist.evidence: market-vs-me-diagnostic section present but >90 days old or no date

rcChecklist.criterion: conviction-scoring + cross-model-validation council both complete; angels-advocate if band ≥ HIGH_CONVICTION
rcChecklist.evidence: run cross-model-validation + conviction-scoring (+ angels-advocate if HIGH_CONVICTION)

variantViews: - Q4 2025 $225M was pull-forward — both mgmt and market anchor on an inflated trailing baseline that overstates BOTH the decline and the recovery. - PMA mix-shift is real but narrow (Apligraf 3% of units). The **operating leverage** on that 3% is ...
